params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: feedRole
params.description: Filter feeds by the current user's role

params.name: includeDeletedUpstreams
params.description: Whether to include feeds with deleted upstream sources

params.name: includeUrls
params.description: Whether to include package manager endpoint URLs

items.docs: Returns a list of package feeds accessible within the organization or project. Feeds are the primary containers for packages in Azure Artifacts. A project can have multiple feeds with different visibility and upstream source settings.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

items.docs: Creates a new artifact feed. You can configure whether the feed allows upstream sources (for fetching public packages), its visibility (project-wide or organization-wide), and whether the feed is public or requires authentication.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: feedId
params.description: Feed GUID or feed name

params.name: includeDeletedUpstreams
params.description: Whether to include deleted upstream sources in the response

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific feed, including its configuration, upstream sources, and visibility settings. The feedId can be either the feed GUID or its name.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: feedId
params.description: Feed GUID or feed name

items.docs: Updates properties of a feed such as its name, description, upstream sources, and retention policy. Only fields provided in the request body will be changed.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: feedId
params.description: Feed GUID or feed name

items.docs: Permanently deletes a feed and all packages it contains. This operation cannot be undone. All packages will be permanently removed from the feed. Consumers of packages from this feed will lose access immediately.

info.name: Azure DevOps List packages in a feed

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: feedId
params.description: Feed GUID or feed name

params.name: protocolType
params.description: Filter packages by protocol type

params.name: packageNameQuery
params.description: Filter packages whose names contain this string

params.name: normalizedPackageName
params.description: Exact package name match (normalized form)

params.name: includeUrls
params.description: Whether to include package manager URLs in the response

params.name: includeAllVersions
params.description: Whether to include all versions or only the latest

params.name: isListed
params.description: Filter by listed status (true=published, false=unlisted)

params.name: getTopPackageVersions
params.description: Whether to include the top versions for each package

params.name: isDeleted
params.description: Whether to include deleted packages

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of packages to return

params.name: $skip
params.description: Number of packages to skip (for pagination)

params.name: continuationToken
params.description: Continuation token for paginated results

items.docs: Returns a list of packages in a specific feed. Supports filtering by package name, protocol type (nuget, npm, maven, pypi, upack), and whether to include deleted packages.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: feedId
params.description: Feed GUID or feed name

params.name: packageId
params.description: GUID identifier of the package

params.name: includeAllVersions
params.description: Whether to include all versions or only the latest

params.name: includeUrls
params.description: Whether to include package manager URLs

params.name: isListed
params.description: Filter versions by listed status

params.name: isDeleted
params.description: Whether to include deleted versions

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific package, including all versions, its protocol type, and normalized name. The packageId is the GUID assigned to the package, not the package name.

info.name: Azure DevOps Delete a package version

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: feedId
params.description: Feed GUID or feed name

params.name: packageId
params.description: GUID identifier of the package

params.name: packageVersionId
params.description: GUID identifier of the package version

items.docs: Deletes a specific version of a package from the feed. By default this moves the version to the recycle bin. Use the permanentlyDelete parameter to permanently remove it. Once permanently deleted, the version cannot be recovered and the same version number cannot be reused.
